pr.title: Non-record submission: Depth Recurrence + Legal Score-First TTT (10L, 1.1532 BPB)

output.summary: 10-layer GPT with depth-recurrence-ready blocks, BigramHash embeddings, U-Net skips, mixed int5/int6 quantization, and competition-legal score-first TTT adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Competition-legal score-first TTT re-trains on validation chunks after scoring, so additional validation-shard training occurs during evaluation.
techniques: Depth recurrence-ready GPT with U-Net skips and XSA layers
BigramHash embeddings with SmearGate gating for compact context
Mixed int5/int6 quantization with SWA and score-first legal TTT
